ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Jan-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods for and with Juanita Malone (Petitioner).

Mr. Woods stated that he e-filed a declaration regarding the deed yesterday, that he has a declaration regarding the San Francisco property loans and a copy of the grant deed on the Pacifica property, that he has proof that the larger loan on the San Francisco property for $93,000.00 was taken out in 2005 and the smaller loan for $43,000.00 was taken out in 2007, and that he anticipates receiving the accounting this week. Ms. Malone stated that she did not sign the accounting because she did not receive it until now along with the notice to appear, that she mailed the accounting on Sunday, that she lives in Pacifica and that she moved there a year ago. Mr. Woods stated that he sent the accounting to Ms. Malone's old address in error. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. and the Order to Show Cause are continued to January 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Jan-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods making a special for Gregory Rocca on behalf of Juanita Malone.

Mr. Woods stated that the supplement and the amended petition was sent to the Client back in late October, that they had not heard back from the Client, that it was sent to a wrong address and that communication with the Client since October had been limited. Mr. Woods also stated that the mortgages were referenced in the original petition (top of page 10 after paragraph 4), that the Executor sold the property in September, that he believes the mortgages were taken out long before Mr. Malone passed away and that the escrow statements are on the last four pages of the petition. In addition, Mr. Woods stated that Ms. Malone paid $1,015,000.00 for the Magellan Drive property, that funds were transferred to Ms. Malone as an individual, that the property was transferred to her name as an individual and that she has to record a deed transferring the property to her as the Executor. The Court noted that the pages in the petition are not numbered, stated that the Executor needs to provide dates the mortgages were taken out and an accounting, and that she needs to appear. Mr. Woods stated that an accounting was filed, but it was rejected because it was not signed by Ms. Malone. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to December 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor to appear on December 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why she should not be suspended for failing to account. Mr. Wood's stated that the Executor's correct address is 420 Magellan Drive, Pacifica, CA 94044.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-22-2018 Continued To Nov-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods for Executor.

Mr. Woods stated that his office attempted to file an amended accounting last week, that it got rejected, that they tried to resubmit it, but were having technical issues and that they can file it by the end of next week. Mr. Woods also stated that he has the deed transferring the property and the closing statements for the San Jose Avenue property and the Pacifica property, and that he can submit them to e-file today. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to November 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-20-2018 Continued To Sep-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods specially appearing for Attorney Gregory Rocca on behalf of Juanita Malone.

Mr. Woods stated that they sent out a revised accounting, a declaration and an amended accounting petition, and that they transferred the Pacifica Property from Juanita Malone as an individual to Juanita Malone as Executor. The Court noted that the escrow statement is not attached to the pleading as indicated and stated that it needs to be filed. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to September 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Continued To Aug-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Michael Woods specially appearing for Gregory Rocca on behalf of Juanita Malone

The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account and for Attorney's fees is continued to August 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Nov-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Woods, specially appearing for petitioner Michael J. Malone.

Mr. Malone reported that he had attempted to file a report on status last week, but the filing had been rejected by the clerk. He stated that the only asset of the estate is a house which is now on the market, and that he anticipated that it should be sold within 90 days. He said he would be filing the Report on Status by the end of the week. The matter was continued to , November 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204, for status on the sale of the property.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)

Off Calendar May-22-2017 Continued To Jun-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods specially appearing for Attorney Gregory Rocca on behalf of Juanita Malone.

Mr. Woods stated that he got in touch with Ms. Malone and Probate Referee Frank Mahoney, that he got the inventory and appraisal, that he needs Ms. Malone's signature and that the inventory is ready to go. Mr. Woods also stated that Ms. Malone was dealing with health issues, but is now doing better and that it is his understanding that Ms. Malone intends to sell the house by the end of summer. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal, etc. is continued to June 5, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
